summary: Price ticker visibility fix verified. The ticker (data-testid='price-ticker-compact') is now correctly positioned below the fixed navbar and above the hero section on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). The fix added pt-[92px] to LandingPage wrapper and solid bg-[#050505] background to ticker. All positioning, z-index hierarchy, scroll behavior, and CTA navigation tests passed.
passed_tests: Price ticker (data-testid='price-ticker-compact') visible on desktop (1920x1080) - y=92, height=45
Price ticker (data-testid='price-ticker-compact') visible on mobile (390x844) - y=92, height=45
Price ticker shows actual price data (BTC $70,000.00, ETH $2,000.00 visible)
Ticker y position (92) >= navbar bottom (90) - 2px gap, no overlap with navbar
Navbar z-index is 50 (higher than ticker, as expected)
Hero section starts at y=137 (exactly at ticker bottom) - no overlap
Hero z-index is 'auto' (lower than ticker z-40)
No layout shift when scrolling - ticker scrolls with page (not fixed)
Navbar stays fixed at top during scroll (y=0 after 500px scroll)
Hero headline (data-testid='hero-title') visible on both desktop and mobile
CTA 'Join Free Beta Access' button visible and clickable - navigates to /register
CTA 'View Live Metrics' button visible and clickable - navigates to /leaderboard
Trust bar visible with all 4 trust items (trust-item-0 through trust-item-3)
Beta spots counter visible - shows 'Spots Remaining: 48'
Live Metrics Terminal visible on desktop with live indicator
test_credentials: No auth required - landing page is public
context_for_next_testing_agent: Price ticker fix verified. LandingPage.jsx line 249 has 'pt-[92px]' wrapper to push content below fixed navbar. LivePriceTicker.jsx line 45 has 'relative z-40 bg-[#050505]'. Positioning: Navbar (y=0, h=90, z=50) -> Ticker (y=92, h=45, z=40) -> Hero (y=137, z=auto). Beta spots remaining=48.

files_changed: /app/frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.jsx (line 255: hero section has reduced pt-12/pt-16 padding)
